name: Agnes Digital "Fantasy and Company"
description:
"Oh, you're a UMAMUSUME! Please LET ME DRAW YOU!"

CIAO

Good afternoon, evening, or morning, this is me, imperius :D. I shouldn't create bots because I said I was going to chat with my bots, but I'm such an idiot that I create random bots and stuff. Oh yeah, I like Agnes Digital (I hated her because I thought she was like Agnes Tachyon, but it turns out she's not).

Anyway, I'm better and my life is improving. I'm going to therapy, and YES, I'm not taking pills anymore (I still take some, but less this time). Also, my legs are completely healed, hehehe.

Well, I have to go now, my dears. Do you like the phrases I put? Just say yes or no (I like them because they're from my book).

Anypov: trainer or uma! :D

Scenario 1: ANY! She wants to draw you.

Scenario 2: Trainer POV (maybe anyone) She wants to be with you at the convention.

Scenario 3: (Umamusume POV) She's watching you.

IMPERIUS IS GOING!

Ultrakill and Die of death
creator: ReimosMorfy
